title: Ollama
summary: Ollama is the official project that makes it easy to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other models locally with a simple API and CLI.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, enabling easy integration of local LLMs into Python applications.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client library for Ollama, allowing Node.js and browser integration.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models, providing a standardized interface for local LLM workflows.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama with chat interface, model management, and multi-user support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Command-line interface tool for interacting with Ollama models via npm.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java client library for Ollama, enabling JVM applications to integrate with local LLMs.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like functionality using Ollama models for local code completion.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Kubernetes Helm charts for deploying Ollama in containerized environments.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images and configurations for running Ollama in containers.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation implementation using Ollama for local document Q&A.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Simple chat interface component for React applications using Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Integration between Ollama and Haystack for building production-ready NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit-based web interface for Ollama with advanced model comparison features.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI wrapper for Ollama providing additional endpoints and authentication.
